policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.acceptance_tier_zh: A1 公司级结构化绝对量，可直接使用
records.recognition_basis_en: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.recognition_basis_zh: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.snippet_en: 064-3:2006 (Greenhouse gases – Part 3: Specification with guidance for the validation and verification of greenhouse gas assertions) Verification Methods - South Korea: GHG emissions and energy consumption statements, management and collection of LG Electronics GHG data, calculation of emissions and reporting processes - Overseas: LG Electronics GHG emissions reports, management and collection of LG Electronics GHG data, calculation of emissions and reporting processes Year Unit Direct GHG Emissions (Scope 1) Indirect GHG Emissions (Scope 2) Scope 1+Scope 2 2019 1,000 tCO2eq 604 869 1,473 2020 429 865 1,294 2021 333 819 1,152 2022 265 662 928 2023 209 665 874 2024 225 681 907 2030 Target 8781) Global GHG Emissions 1) A 54.6% reduction compared to 2017 levels in line with SBTi standards Key Reduction Achievements • In 2024, LG achieved a 19.4% reduction in emission per unit compared to its 2030 target of 20%. • In the washing machine category, despite increased sales, improved energy efficiency led to a reduction of approximately 850,000 tons of CO2eglobally. • In the TV category, average CO2emissions per unit were reduced by 4.3 kg, resulting in a global reduction of approximately 110,000 tons of CO2e, despite increased sales. • In the refrigerator category, energy efficiency per unit capacity improved by 4.3%, contributing to a reduction in greenhouse gas emissions. Year Improvement in unit efficiency during the product use stage compared to 2020 2022 13.1% 2023 11.8%
records.snippet_zh: 064-3:2006 (Greenhouse gases – Part 3: Specification with guidance for the validation and verification of greenhouse gas assertions) Verification Methods - South Korea: GHG emissions and energy consumption statements, management and collection of LG Electronics GHG data, calculation of emissions and reporting processes - Overseas: LG Electronics GHG emissions reports, management and collection of LG Electronics GHG data, calculation of emissions and reporting processes Year Unit Direct GHG Emissions (Scope 1) Indirect GHG Emissions (Scope 2) Scope 1+Scope 2 2019 1,000 tCO2eq 604 869 1,473 2020 429 865 1,294 2021 333 819 1,152 2022 265 662 928 2023 209 665 874 2024 225 681 907 2030 Target 8781) Global GHG Emissions 1) A 54.6% reduction compared to 2017 levels in line with SBTi standards Key Reduction Achievements • In 2024, LG achieved a 19.4% reduction in emission per unit compared to its 2030 target of 20%. • In the washing machine category, despite increased sales, improved energy efficiency led to a reduction of approximately 850,000 tons of CO2eglobally. • In the TV category, average CO2emissions per unit were reduced by 4.3 kg, resulting in a global reduction of approximately 110,000 tons of CO2e, despite increased sales. • In the refrigerator category, energy efficiency per unit capacity improved by 4.3%, contributing to a reduction in greenhouse gas emissions. Year Improvement in unit efficiency during the product use stage compared to 2020 2022 13.1% 2023 11.8%
